headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 39 points, nearly extending his own franchise record for 40-point playoff games, and the New York Knicks routed the Atlanta Hawks 126-97 on Tuesday night for a 3-2 lead in the first-round playoff series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Brunson scores 39 points and the Knicks rout the Hawks 126-97 for a 3-2 series lead
